action: Notify all departments and control room of planned shutdown
safety_check: Confirm communication received by all parties

action: Gradually reduce fuel feed rate to 50% MCR over 30 minutes
safety_check: Monitor bed temperature — must not drop below 750°C during reduction
acceptance_criteria: Load at 50% MCR; all parameters stable

action: Reduce steam load to 25% MCR; switch auxiliary steam to backup
safety_check: Verify auxiliary steam header pressure maintained
acceptance_criteria: Load at 25% MCR; auxiliary steam switched

action: Stop coal feeding system; allow bed to burn down
safety_check: Monitor bed temperature decline — should be gradual
prerequisites: Ash conveyor running to remove bed material
acceptance_criteria: Coal feed stopped; bed temperature declining

action: Stop PA fan after bed temperature drops below 500°C
safety_check: Check for no abnormal sounds from bed area

action: Stop FD fan; maintain ID fan for 30 min for purge
safety_check: Verify 5 complete air changes through furnace

action: Stop ID fan; close all dampers; begin natural cooldown
safety_check: Verify all fans stopped and dampers closed

action: Maintain drum level at normal; allow natural cooling for 12-24 hours
safety_check: Monitor drum pressure decline — vent at <2 bar if needed

action: Apply LOTO on all energy sources — steam; fuel; electrical; air
safety_check: Verify zero energy on all sources; hang LOTO tags
prerequisites: Boiler fully cooled; pressure at zero
acceptance_criteria: LOTO tags applied; all energy sources verified zero

action: Drain boiler water after cooling below 80°C; open manholes after pressure equalization
safety_check: Confirm atmospheric pressure before opening manholes; confined space permit
acceptance_criteria: Boiler drained; manholes open; safe for entry

action: Complete pre-startup checklist — mechanical; electrical; instrumentation; safety systems
safety_check: Verify all maintenance work completed and signed off

action: Fill boiler with treated DM water to normal operating level
safety_check: Verify water quality — pH; TDS; dissolved O2
prerequisites: DM plant operational; water quality tested
acceptance_criteria: Drum at normal level; water quality acceptable

action: Start ID fan; start FD fan; ignite oil burner for bed heating
safety_check: Verify furnace purge complete (5 air changes) before ignition
prerequisites: All fans operational; fuel oil available
acceptance_criteria: Oil burner lit; bed heating commenced

action: Heat bed gradually at max 50°C/hour until bed reaches 750°C
safety_check: Monitor refractory expansion; no sudden temperature changes
acceptance_criteria: Bed temperature at 750°C; ready for coal

action: Start coal feeding at minimum rate; gradually increase to 50% MCR
safety_check: Monitor bed temperature stability; check for clinker formation

action: Increase load to 75% then 100% MCR in 25% increments every 30 minutes
safety_check: Monitor all parameters — pressure; temperature; water level; emissions
acceptance_criteria: Boiler at MCR; all parameters within limits

action: Synchronize with steam header; transfer loads; stop oil burner
safety_check: Verify steam quality meets header requirements
acceptance_criteria: Boiler on header; oil burner stopped

action: Complete post-startup monitoring for 4 hours; record all parameters hourly
acceptance_criteria: 4-hour stable operation confirmed; handover to normal shift
